h06f2f978gff66g4d01g8ba8g444e80e8a163: I've seen some cruel weapons used in my time, but turning someone's mind against them takes the prize.
hbb0886d8g0f50g46c6gb841g6a0c0bd822e2: These True Souls are more powerful than I realised. And more ruthless. We shouldn't pick fights with them idly.
hfd1560a8gd383g4129gb5b6g79820d637829: There's nothing idle about it. These fanatics need to be stopped.
h9a1220a8g41cdg4ef6gbaabgde0a0d8772b5: The world's full of do-gooders who'll be perfectly willing to make that their problem.
hd14315cfg0429g49a1g92a3gc478df61e2ce: Our problem could come to a head a lot sooner than whatever these True Souls are up to. We have to focus on a cure.
h9f15fd93g3e69g4ab9ga758g201457d59eab: If True Souls can toy with our minds, perhaps we can do the same. Imagine the possibilities.
ha52c86c3g2efag4c16g88f2gb335d5f1cbec: In other, saner circumstances that might be an intriguing prospect. But forgive me if I'm not eager to give these parasites more leverage.
h0adc2a88g9711g4af5g9033ge8a3ba57e037: That said... well, everyone knows what desperate times call for, don't they?
h5698caebg603dg4059g9b84g34e8f79f5b77: And I think I'd enjoy feeding these True Souls some of their own putrid medicine.
h94b71cadg96c0g4627g8d64g8af958a3ee49: Agreed. Finding a cure is already hard enough.
hde316b6agde18g42a9gaa12g117de5451035: Hopefully a cure won't leave us helpless against these True Souls. Each one seems more formidable than the last.
h66282f94g1054g487eg8d91g6ea5acbe3d7c: Perhaps it wouldn't be the worst thing to use these powers to our own advantage - keep the future fights as fair as we can.
